title: Perl script for evaluating tracr:target interactions with Nupack
author: Barquist, Lars
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: A Perl script to automate prediction of complex concentrations and interacting base-pairs between a single reference RNA molecule and a fasta file of potential RNA targets using Nupack (tested with version 3.2.2).
steps_raw: A Perl script to automate prediction of complex concentrations and interacting base-pairs between a single reference RNA molecule and a fasta file of potential RNA targets using Nupack (tested with version 3.2.2).
